title: Work with us
description: Join 6,500 professionals who take pride in building structures that define cities.

hero.title:
Where engineers lead.
Where careers are built.
hero.lede: Join 6,500 professionals who take pride in building structures that define cities.

benefits.title: Career growth
benefits.text: Structured promotion pathways, mentorship programmes and funded professional accreditation from day one.

benefits.title: Global mobility
benefits.text: 27 countries, one team. International rotations and expat packages are available from Associate level upward.

benefits.title: Safety culture
benefits.text: 12.4M hours without a lost-time incident. Safety is our most important value — never traded for cost or schedule.

benefits.title: Market-leading pay
benefits.text: Competitive base salaries, performance bonuses, equity participation at senior levels and comprehensive benefits.

benefits.title: Diverse teams
benefits.text: We hire the best engineers regardless of background. Our DEIB programme is externally benchmarked and reported annually.

benefits.title: Sustainability mission
benefits.text: Join a team committed to net-zero. Our ESG targets are science-based and our sustainability report is published every year.
